examples: Miss Sophy was a fresh, good-humoured, buxom girl of twenty.
Miss Sophy was a fresh, good - humoured, buxom girl of twenty.
He ordered a beer from the buxom, vacant-stared server, trying not to look obviously out of place.
He also described Beryl Cook, whose whimsical paintings of buxom figures, as being more popular and recognisable than many of the artists featured in Britain's biggest galleries.
